title: Thrall
description: When you die but *call on one of the Things Below by name and beseech them to intercede*, they do. Death is averted, but you gain this insert and 1 Mark

submoves.title: Your Master
submoves.description:
The Thing Below that you called upon? The one that plucked your soul from the Black Gates and hides you from the Pale Hunter? It owns you now.Name your master here, along with any titles that you know:

____master______

submoves.title: Instinct
submoves.description: Loose the Instinct from your playbook, and replace it with one of these (your choice):
pickOne: Fascination - To explore your powers, your master, your new existence
Resistance - To struggle against your master and cling to humanity
Shame - To hide and deny your true nature

submoves.title: Favor
submoves.description:
Your favor starts at 0 and can go no higher than 3. When you *have 3 Favor and would gain another, reduce your Favor to 0 and choose 1:

- Ask a question of your master and gain advantage on your next roll to act on the answer

- Gain a new Mark of your choice. Then ask the GM to choose a Mark that you don't have, and cross it off - you can never gain it.

submoves.title: Impulse
submoves.description:
Ask the GM to describe an impulse that represents your master's nature and will  ______impulse______ 

When the GM compels you to act on your impulse, gain 1 Favor if you act as bidden. If you resist roll +WIS:

bullets: Start acting as compelled, but stop yourself before you go too far
Harm yourself (d6 damage, ignores armor) to regain control

outcomes.text: You come to your senses later, having done gods-know-what
When you **act on your impulse without being compelled to do so**, and your actions cause you or your allies trouble, gain 1 Favor

submoves.title: Dark Succor
submoves.description: When you are dying or killed outright, your master intercedes on your behalf. You will recover, here and now or at a time and place of the GM's choosing. Then, roll +Favor:

bullets: Gain a new Mark of the GM's choice
Cross off a Mark that you don't have—you can never gain it
Your master gives you a task; until you complete it, your Favor stays at 0

submoves.title: Unholy Vessel
submoves.description: When you would gain a Mark but there are none left to gain, your humanity is utterly lost. You become a threat in the GM's control. Make a new character.
